sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5977" key="a)mfipari/stamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιπαρίσταμαι</orth>, <sense id="n5977.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stand about and beside,</tr_> Epic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.Oxy.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">412.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
